_comment: This devcontainer is configured for GitHub Codespaces to run a Jekyll site with Python support.
name: Pages Jekyll Site
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3-pip python-is-python3 python3-venv build-essential zlib1g-dev jupyter-notebook sqlite3 lsof && sudo mkdir -p /opt/gems && sudo chmod -R 777 /opt/gems && echo 'export GEM_HOME="/opt/gems"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH="/opt/gems/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && export GEM_HOME=/opt/gems && export PATH=/opt/gems/bin:$PATH && sudo gem install bundler jekyll benchmark openssl zlib racc bigdecimal drb unicode-display_width logger etc fileutils ipaddr mutex_m ostruct rss strscan stringio time && bundle install && pip3 install -r requirements.txt
